overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime journey through Night City during a heavy rainstorm. The vehicle travels through covered highways, tunnels with distinctive yellow railings, and busy neon-lit urban intersections with dense cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway with green noise barriers

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through covered highway section with green sound barriers on the right

notable_agents.action: oncoming traffic passing in opposite lanes

entered.detail: tall green transparent noise reduction barrier running along the right side of the highway
concrete overhead structure covering the highway
headlights from vehicles traveling in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered highway tunnel with green transparent noise barriers on the right side. The road is wet from rain, and oncoming traffic is visible in the left lanes. The environment is artificially lit with no sky visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with futuristic city skyline view

events.description: exiting covered tunnel into open elevated highway with city skyline visible ahead

metal safety barrier along the right edge of the elevated highway
large illuminated advertising displays on distant buildings
rain-soaked road surface reflecting vehicle headlights and city lights

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the covered tunnel onto an open elevated highway with a panoramic view of the futuristic city skyline. Tall glass skyscrapers with neon billboards rise in the distance, and the wet road surface reflects the ambient city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed tunnel with yellow safety railings

ambient lighting shifts from mixed city light to darker artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through enclosed tunnel section with yellow railings visible on both sides

concrete and metal walls with industrial texture

massive illuminated billboard displaying advertisement at tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a fully enclosed tunnel with distinctive yellow safety railings and industrial concrete walls. Overhead lights illuminate the path ahead where a large holographic advertisement is visible at the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting tunnel into busy city intersection with pedestrians and crosswalks
navigating through intersection while pedestrians cross the street
making right turn at intersection to enter commercial street

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy intersection, yielding to pedestrians and making a right turn

white sedan turning at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: white striped crosswalk lines on the wet asphalt
illuminated traffic lights suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into a bustling urban intersection filled with pedestrians crossing the street. The vehicle navigates through crosswalk markings while making a right turn, surrounded by commercial buildings with bright neon signage and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: slowing down for traffic control or intersection ahead
passing under overhead road structure or overpass

various colorful neon signs advertising businesses in Japanese and English
elevated highway or monorail track passing over the street
yellow and metal railings separating sidewalk from roadway

segments.scene_description: Driving along a commercial city street lined with storefronts and vibrant neon signage. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks under umbrellas, and the vehicle passes under an overhead road structure while navigating through the rain-soaked urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from the claustrophobic confines of highway tunnels into the sprawling, neon-drenched streets of a rainy metropolis. It begins within a covered highway tunnel flanked by green transparent noise barriers and wet pavement, before emerging onto an open elevated highway that reveals a panoramic skyline of towering glass skyscrapers and glowing billboards. The camera then dives back into an enclosed industrial tunnel characterized by yellow safety railings and overhead lighting, moving toward a large holographic advertisement at the exit. As the vehicle breaks out of the tunnel, the scene opens into a bustling urban intersection filled with pedestrians and bright commercial signage. Finally, the journey continues along a rain-soaked city street lined with vibrant storefronts and umbrellas, passing under an overhead road structure amidst the dense cyberpunk architecture.
